title: Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Low Income/Subsidized Private Rental Housing * Native American Community 2 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions Older Adults Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE COOS, LOWER UMPQUA, AND SIUSLAW INDIANS GOVERNMENT OFFICE TRIBAL HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides affordable rental housing. 1245 Fulton Avenue Coos Bay, OR 97420 Eligibility: Must be enrolled in a federally recognized tribe and families who are low-income Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 888-9577 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE UMATILLA INDIAN RESERVATION HOUSING DEPARTMENT CTUIR HOUSING DEPARTMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides rental units for tribal members. 51 Umatilla Loop Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: -Head of Household (HOH) is a member of a federally recognized Indian Tribe or is non-enrolled but a parent of a minor CTUIR enrolled child (child must be in the household) -Income requriements vary based on housing type with household annual median income must be below 50%-80% of (AMI) Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-4pm Email (541) 429-7920 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE COOS, LOWER UMPQUA, AND SIUSLAW INDIANS TRIBAL HOUSING CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF THE UMATILLA INDIAN RESERVATION CTUIR HOUSING DEPARTMENT
